products.title: Kate Sheer Argyle Pleated Skirt
products.description: The 'Kate' Skirt has a lightweight sheer base and fine sunray pleats that elongate the dusky pink and burgundy argyle print, adding to the movement of the skirt and providing a subtle nod to the British painter Ithell Colquhoun - one of the artistic inspirations behind the SS25 collection. Designed to sit comfortably at the waist and skim the floor, the 'Kate' skirt was introduced as part of the S

products.title: Abel Crochet Tabard Blue
products.description: The Abel crochet tabard features a central motif, inspired by hand painted ceramic tiles found adorning the streets of Guimarães, Portugal. The tabard comes in one size with ties on each side to adjust the fit to the wearers desire. The Ecru and Blue cotton yarn is worked by hand to create the tile motif, meaning each piece has unique character and none are quite identical. Relaxed Fit One size Ad

products.title: Abel Crochet Short - Blue
products.description: The 'Abel' crochet short features a mirrored motif on each side, inspired by hand painted ceramic tiles found adorning the streets of Guimarães, Portugal. An internal drawstring cord allows the wearer to adjust the size and tightness accordingly to their fit. The Ecru and Blue cotton yarn is worked by hand to create the tile motif, meaning each piece has unique character and none are quite identic

products.title: Abel Crochet Short - Green
products.description: The Abel crochet short features a mirrored motif on each side, inspired by hand painted ceramic tiles found adorning the streets of Guimarães, Portugal. An internal drawstring cord allows the wearer to adjust the size and tightness accordingly to their fit. The Ecru and Green cotton yarn is worked by hand to create the tile motif, meaning each piece has unique character and none are quite identica

products.title: Turing Straight Leg Trouser - Pink/Orange
products.description: The Turing straight leg trouser is cut in a lightweight David Hicks-style pink and orange cotton w ith a delicately woven stripe design and a casual pleated style. Made in Portugal 100% Cotton Casual fit Pink and orange colourway

products.title: Cochrane Vest - Black
products.description: The 'Cochrane' vest features an asymmetric tie fastening at the neckline, drawn from the construction of historic rowing jerseys. Made in specially woven ribbed jersey in Portugal. The 'Cochrane' vest style first appeared in our Spring 2022 collection. Fit note: This style is designed for a close, body-hugging fit. If you prefer a more relaxed feel, we recommend sizing up.

products.title: S.S.DALEY Gift Card
products.description: An S.S.DALEY digital gift card; for when you want to give something precise, but leave the choice open. Select a value, add the recipient’s email address, and the gift card will be delivered instantly by email with a unique redemption code. Gift cards are redeemable online at sssdaley.com. They are non-refundable and cannot be exchanged for cash.

products.title: Haven Rope-Fastened Jacket — Heathered Brown
products.description: The Haven Jacket is crafted from alpaca-blend wool, chosen for its warmth, lightness, and softly brushed surface. Drawing on the familiar language of the duffle coat, the silhouette is cropped and gently structured, allowing the texture of the fabric to lead. Across the front, nautical rope and toggle fastenings introduce a graphic rhythm, referencing coastal utility while reading as decorative ra

products.title: Mariner Buttoned Trousers — Black
products.description: A refined interpretation of classic naval tailoring. The Mariner Trousers are crafted from 100% premium tailoring wool, drawing on the formal codes of Royal Navy uniforms and reworking them through a distinctly feminine line. Cut with a high waist and a long, fluid leg, the silhouette skims the body before falling clean to the floor. Eight ecru buttons punctuate the front, placed as both functiona

products.title: Badger Sweater - Womens
products.description: Knitted from 100% superfine lambswool, this sweater features a graphic and intricate intarsia depiction of a badger. The artwork stretches across both the front and back of the sweater, creating a bold wraparound. Set in grey and black, the badger is rendered in layered tones of white, grey, and black for depth and texture.

products.title: Cyril' Lamb Motif Cardigan - Green
products.description: The Cyril Cardigan is crafted from 100% superfine Scottish lambswool, selected for its warmth, softness, and clean, structured finish. The design draws on a 1950s Easter card, translated into mirrored leaping lamb motifs rendered through intricate intarsia knitting. Across the body and sleeves, fine black wool lines trace a fence-like pattern, adding depth and gentle contrast to the green ground.

products.title: Aker Sheer Wool Henley - Ecru
products.description: The Aker Top is a women’s reinterpretation of the Henley jerseys worn by men’s rowing teams in the 1930s, reimagined in a lighter, more intimate register. Long sleeves and an asymmetric four-button placket trace the body with quiet intention. Knitted from a specially developed sheer wool jersey, the fabric is soft, breathable, and gently elastic, sitting close to the skin with a delicate transpare

products.title: Keep Staring T-Shirt
products.description: Cut to a slim, close-fitting silhouette, the Keep Staring T-Shirt is crafted from soft cotton jersey with a lightly structured handle. Designed to sit neatly against the body, it reads as intimate and intentional rather than overtly graphic. Across the front, a playful slogan “Keep staring, I might do a trick” is surrounded by a series of hand-drawn lurcher illustrations, arranged as small narrati

products.title: Cochrane Racer-Back Vest — Black
products.description: A women’s reworking of the S.S.DALEY Cochrane vest, reshaped to a racer-back silhouette. Knitted in a soft, sheer ecru rib with a close fit, the vest is finished with an asymmetric tie fastening at the neckline, drawn from the construction of historic rowing jerseys.

products.title: Eliza Square-Neck Vest — White
products.description: A pared-back vest distilled to its essential lines. The Eliza Vest is cut from a softly structured wool jersey, chosen for its gentle weight and natural elasticity. A clean square neckline frames the collarbone, while the racer-back cut sharpens the silhouette from behind, creating a subtle tension between softness and structure. Designed to sit close to the body without restriction, the piece mov

products.title: Celeste Sunray Pleated Skirt
products.description: The Celeste Skirt is cut with fine sunray pleats and crafted in a sheer brown fabric that moves lightly with the body. The skirt is finished with an opaque sandwashed silk hem, grounding the transparency and lending weight to the silhouette. Designed to sit fluidly at the waist, the contrast between sheer and solid creates depth and quiet movement, allowing the pleating to open and close as the we

products.title: Rowena Scarf Shirt
products.description: The Rowena Scarf Shirt is cut from fluid silk and printed with an all-over floral motif drawn from archival textile references. Designed with an integrated scarf detail that falls loosely at the front, the shirt is shaped with a relaxed body and soft drape through the sleeve. The print brings colour and movement to an otherwise pared-back silhouette, allowing the piece to be worn either layered be

products.title: Pointer Sweater
products.description: The Pointer Sweater is knitted from 100% lambswool and features an intarsia motif depicting a Dalmatian, rendered in soft contrast across the chest. The knit is cut with a relaxed body and gently elongated sleeves, allowing the fabric to fall naturally at the wrist. Finished with deep burgundy ribbing at the hem and cuffs, the piece combines graphic imagery with the ease of a familiar knit.

products.title: Evelyn Trench Jacket
products.description: The Evelyn Peplum Trench is a cropped reinterpretation of a traditional British women’s trench coat. Cut from mid-weight cotton gabardine, the silhouette is shaped through the waist and finished with a pleated peplum that subtly extends the line of the body. Heritage trench elements: a double-breasted front, epaulettes and cuff straps are paired with a soft leather under-collar and adjustable buck

products.title: Jasper Duck Cardigan - Derby Grey
products.description: The Jasper Duck Cardigan returns in a grey colourway, continuing a motif drawn from collegiate rowing culture. The twin duck intarsia references the Mallard Song , a traditional anthem associated with Oxford rowing crews and post-race ritual. Knitted in Scotland from 100% superfine lambswool, the cardigan is cut to a boxy silhouette with a five-button front and a naturally lightweight handle. Firs

products.title: Eilidh Trouser
products.description: The Eilidh Trouser is cut to a signature S.S.DALEY wide-leg silhouette in dark brown corduroy. Designed with volume through the leg and a clean, high-waisted line, the proportions are deliberate and grounding, allowing the weight and texture of the cloth to define the shape.

products.title: Eilidh Jacket
products.description: The Eilidh Jacket is a double-breasted style cut from dark brown corduroy, shaped with structured shoulders and a fitted line through the waist and hips. The silhouette is precise and controlled, finished with contrasting ecru buttons that sharpen the depth of the cloth.

products.title: Edith Pleated Skirt — Brown Floral
products.description: The Edith skirt is cut to a full-length, sunray-pleated silhouette and printed with a shadowed floral motif in muted ochre and deep wine tones against black. The dense, overlapping pattern lends the skirt a graphic quality, softened by fluid movement through the pleats. Designed to sit at the waist and fall with quiet weight.

products.title: Cordelia Cropped Jacket — Black
products.description: The Cordelia jacket is cut to a cropped, collarless silhouette from black linen and hand embroidered in India. Delicate floral and leaf motifs trace the front panels in tonal thread, drawing on traditional botanical embroidery while remaining precise and restrained. Designed to sit close to the body, the jacket brings structure and softness into quiet balance.

products.title: Harrington Trench Coat — Black Check
products.description: The Harrington trench is cut to a longline silhouette in a black checked wool and made in Italy. Designed with a double-breasted front and structured epaulettes at the shoulders, the coat is finished with leather collar detailing, a belt and side pockets, its proportions informed by British officer’s greatcoats.

products.title: Sugar & Spice Cardigan
products.description: Knitted in 100% superfine lambswool, this cardigan is crafted in a rich wine-red base and fastened with six mock-horn buttons. The front features intarsia artwork of a flirtatious sugar cube and self-assured spice bottle, adapted from a 1930s British matchbook illustration for an Old Fashioned cocktail recipe. The characters are rendered in light red, ecru, black and light green yarns.

products.title: Marlowe Trench Coat
products.description: The Marlowe trench is cut to a longline silhouette from black wool and made in Italy. Designed with a double-breasted front and structured epaulettes at the shoulders, the coat is finished with a belt and side pockets, informed by the proportions of British officer’s greatcoats.

products.title: Elspeth Scarf Shirt — White
products.description: Cut from sandwashed silk, the Elspeth shirt is designed with an integrated scarf detail that falls loosely from the neckline. The silhouette is fluid and lightly structured, with long sleeves and a soft handle that moves with the body.

products.title: Cecilia Layered Shirt
products.description: The Cecilia shirt is cut from white linen and finished with a sheer organza overlay, hand embroidered with red floral motifs across the chest. Designed with a relaxed, short-sleeved silhouette, the layered construction introduces depth and texture while maintaining a light, breathable feel.

products.title: Cochrane Racer-Back Vest — Ecru
products.description: A women’s reworking of the S.S.DALEY Cochrane vest, reshaped to a racer-back silhouette. Knitted in a soft, sheer ecru rib with a close fit, the vest is finished with an asymmetric tie fastening at the neckline, drawn from the construction of historic rowing jerseys.

products.title: Anna Pleated Skirt - Blue Floral
products.description: The Anna skirt is cut in a sunray pleat from a smooth, mid-weight fabric printed with a bold blue floral motif on an ivory ground. Designed to sit at the waist and fall with a clean, elongated line, the skirt is finished with discreet side pockets.

products.title: Olivia Pleated Skirt - Vines
products.description: The Olivia skirt is cut in a sunray pleat from a sheer georgette fabric, printed with a blue ceramic floral motif on a pale ground. Designed to sit at the waist and fall with a light, elongated line.

products.title: Kate Pleated Skirt - Thorns
products.description: The Kate skirt is cut in a sunray pleat from a smooth, mid-weight fabric printed with a floral and thorn motif in red, blue, purple and green on an ivory ground. Designed to sit at the waist and fall with a fluid, elongated line.

products.title: Marianne' Tailored Jacket
products.description: A double-breasted tailored jacket cut from heavyweight black wool. The silhouette takes cues from a classic peacoat, reworked with a defined waist and clean proportion through the hips. Finished with contrasting ecru buttons.

products.title: Isla Fairisle Cardigan
products.description: Knitted in Scotland from 100% Scottish wool, the Fairisle cardigan is rendered in white and detailed with a brown Fairisle motif across the shoulders and collarbone. Finished with refined ribbed trims and grey pearlescent buttons.

products.title: Roedean Turtleneck - Postbox
products.description: Knitted in Scotland from 100% superfine lambswool, the Roedean mock neck is shaped with a relaxed fit. Finished with a structured mock neckline and fine rib detailing, the jumper offers warmth without weight in a postbox red Scottish yarn.

products.title: Clarence Trouser - Black
products.description: Crafted from a technical cotton-blend woven in a Japanese mill, the Clarence Trouser reflects a modern, understated approach to menswear. The subtly coarse handle of the cloth lends the barrel-leg silhouette its structured ease, giving the trouser a clean, architectural shape within a refined everyday wardrobe. Double front pleats introduce movement and volume, while the interior reveals considere

products.title: Clarence Chore Jacket - Black
products.description: Cut from a technical Japanese cotton-blend with a dry, structured hand, the Clarence Chore Jacket draws on the overshirts worn by London dockworkers in the mid-20th century, translated here through a more refined proportion. Three double-entry external pockets are lined in check cotton, with an internal chest pocket set into the interior. Ecru herringbone tape finishes the cuffs and traces the fro

products.title: Turing Shirt - White Striped Seersucker
products.description: The newest 'Turing' Shirt is cut in a lightweight, white striped seersucker fabric. With a relaxed, boxy shape, the 'Turing' Shirt is finished with a contrast horizontal patch pocket and our burgundy embroidered S.S.DALEY logo.

products.title: Badger Sweater
products.description: Knitted from 100% superfine lambswool, this sweater features a graphic and intricate intarsia depiction of a badger. The artwork stretches across both the front and back of the sweater, creating a bold wraparound. Set in grey and black, the badger is rendered in layered tones of white, grey, and black for depth and texture.

products.title: Lurcher T-Shirt
products.description: Cut to a slim, muscle-fit silhouette and crafted from soft cotton jersey, the 'Lurcher' t-shirt is designed to sit closely against the body. Across the front, a hand-drawn rendering of a lurcher dog - inspired by a 1920s still-life study - is picked out in white against a dusky pink background.

products.title: Keep Staring T-Shirt
products.description: Cut to a slim, muscle-fit silhouette and crafted from soft cotton jersey, the 'Keep Staring' t-shirt is designed to sit closely against the body. A playful "Keep staring I might do a trick" slogan sits among a scattering of hand-drawn sketches showing lurcher dogs in small vignettes, from ducks to a distant Big Ben.

products.title: Durham Quilted Jacket - Green
products.description: Cut to a relaxed, boxy fit, the 'Durham' jacket reimagines the utilitarian outerwear worn by British gardeners and estate workers in the late 20th century. The khaki quilted body is framed with brown piping. A soft corduroy collar, mock-horn buttons and a cotton check lining create an interesting textural mix, while a vermillion and ecru rubber S.S.DALEY duck logo sits at the back neck.

products.title: How To Pet A Dog T-Shirt
products.description: Cut in a soft, mid-weight white cotton jersey, the 'How To' T-shirt is a boxy casual fit. Across the front and back, black sketch-like embroidery illustrates a guide to proper dog-petting etiquette. The back neck branding features the double duck logo printed in black foil.

products.title: Harold Rib Henley
products.description: A long-sleeve rib knit cut close to the body, finished in a warm ecru tone with a clean Henley placket.

products.title: Disney x S.S.DALEY Tigger Scarf
products.description: Forming part of the limited-edition Disney x S.S.DALEY collaboration and knitted in a plush mohair-blend yarn, this oversized scarf channels Tigger’s spirit through its graphic, bouncing stripe motif - a nod to his quick, staccato personality. A large Winnie the Pooh artwork label sits at the hem, anchored with a hand embroidered blanket stitch finish.

products.title: Disney x S.S.DALEY Slice of Pie Jacket
products.description: A coach jacket made from surplus striped cotton that has been coated with a lightweight, water-resistant gel print layer, this jacket carries a striking original Winnie the Pooh sketched print lifted directly from the Disney Archives. A subtle slim-but-boxy cut defines the shape, while elasticated cuffs with poppers allow the sleeves to tighten or relax as needed. A limited-edition style from the

products.title: Disney x S.S.DALEY Stuck Short
products.description: These limited-edition shorts from the Disney x S.S.DALEY collaboration are made from surplus striped cotton that has been coated with a lightweight, water-resistant gel print layer, this jacket carries a striking original Winnie the Pooh sketch lifted directly from the Disney Archives. The shorts carry a hand-sketched scene lifted directly from the Disney Archives of Winnie the Pooh and Owl. The s

products.title: Disney x S.S.DALEY Floatin' Shirt
products.description: Forming part of the limited-edition Disney x S.S.DALEY capsule, this shirt is crafted from 100% linen and embroidered with a gentle riverside tableau of Eeyore floating downstream among cattails and wandering weeds. The artwork winds across the chest, cuffs and hem in sketch-like detailing. The shirt is finished with a laid-back camp collar and an easy, relaxed fit.

products.title: Dennis Harrington Jacket - Honey
products.description: The 'Dennis' harrington jacket is a lightweight technical jacket crafted from a honey-beige cotton blend. A soft light-beige Nappa leather collar frames the neckline, while the two-way zip closure along the body and sleeves introduces an adaptable structure. Exaggerated cuffs feature a dual zip closure and metal press studs and an elasticated hem adds controlled volume when fastened. Inside, the b

products.title: Sugar & Spice Cardigan
products.description: Knitted in 100% superfine lambswool, this cardigan is crafted in a rich wine-red base and fastened with six mock-horn buttons. The front features intarsia artwork of a flirtatious sugar cube and self-assured spice jar — a playful S.S.DALEY narrative knitted directly into the fabric. Made in Scotland.

products.title: Disney x S.S.DALEY Rabbits Howse T-Shirt
products.description: A limited-edition graphic t-shirt from the Disney x S.S.DALEY collaboration, cut in a mid-weight 100% cotton jersey and shaped in a boxy fit. The artwork is taken directly from an original colour sketch preserved in the Disney Archives, depicting Winnie the Pooh wedged inside Rabbit’s warren, honey pot just behind him. Puff embroidery traces the Winnie the Pooh lettering, while a crinkle-printed S

products.title: Disney x S.S.DALEY Thoughts T-Shirt
products.description: A limited-edition printed t-shirt from the Disney x S.S.DALEY collaboration. Crafted in a lightweight, soft 100% cotton jersey and cut to a tight, slim fit. The artwork draws directly from an original colour sketch in the Disney Archives, showing Winnie the Pooh strolling through a grassy field as typewriter-style letters drift and tumble across the sky. The print wraps the body with a sense of mo

products.title: Harrow Polo - Oatmeal Marl
products.description: Knitted in Scotland from 100% pure wool in a marled oatmeal grey, the 'Harrow' polo balances soft structure with lived-in warmth. Raglan sleeves create an easy, rounded silhouette beneath a clean, minimal collar. The natural wooden buttons provide an understated finish to a piece built for longevity.

products.title: Harrow Polo - Postbox
products.description: Knitted in Scotland from 100% pure wool in a distinctive postbox red, the 'Harrow' polo balances soft structure with lived-in warmth. Raglan sleeves create an easy, rounded silhouette beneath a clean, minimal collar. The natural wooden buttons provide an understated finishing detail.

products.title: Harrow Polo - Mustard
products.description: Knitted in Scotland from 100% pure wool in a warm mustard yellow, the 'Harrow' polo balances soft structure with lived-in warmth. Raglan sleeves create an easy, rounded silhouette beneath a clean, minimal collar. The natural wooden buttons provide an understated finishing detail.

products.title: Eddie Fair Isle Vest
products.description: Made in Scotland from 100% pure wool, the 'Eddie' vest features a calibrated Fair Isle motif in purples, reds, browns, black and cream. The colours settle into a steady pattern, anchored by a purple ribbing at the neck, armholes and hem. The V-neck and relaxed armholes create a clean silhouette.

products.title: Jasper Duck Cardigan - Derby Grey
products.description: The ‘Jasper’ Duck Cardigan returns this season in a new grey colourway. Inspired by the 1940s Oxford rowing team cardigan, the piece pays homage to the historic “Mallard Song,” traditionally sung to celebrate rowing victories. Knitted from 100% superfine Scottish lambswool, the ‘Jasper’ Cardigan offers a boxy fit, a 5-button front closure and a naturally lightweight handle. First introduced on the

products.title: Harrow Polo - Moss
products.description: Knitted in Scotland from 100% pure wool in a marled moss green, the 'Harrow' polo balances soft structure with lived-in warmth. Raglan sleeves create an easy, rounded silhouette beneath a clean, minimal collar. The natural wooden buttons provide an understated finishing detail.

products.title: Harold V-Neck Sweater - Olive/Ecru
products.description: The 'Harold' V-Neck sweater is evocative of a classic 1950s British railway jumper and imbued with S.S.DALEY's signature wit and playfulness. Inspired by Steven's dogs Basil and Ernest, we see a partnership of Dachshund dogs on the front against a rich dark green and cream colour palette, accented by pops of a grass green border.

products.title: Clarence Chore Jacket - Blue & White Check
products.description: The Clarence Chore Jacket draws on the overshirts worn by London dockworkers in the mid-20th century, translated here through a more refined proportion. There are three external pockets, with an internal chest pocket set into the interior. Ecru herringbone tape finishes the cuffs and traces the front placket. Proportions are balanced, allowing the jacket to sit cleanly when layered or worn on its

products.title: Clarence Chore Jacket - Picnic Check
products.description: The Clarence Chore Jacket draws on the overshirts worn by London dockworkers in the mid-20th century, translated here through a more refined proportion. There are three double-entry external pockets, with an internal chest pocket set into the interior. Ecru herringbone tape finishes the cuffs and traces the front placket. Proportions are balanced, allowing the jacket to sit cleanly when layered or

products.title: Audrey Trousers
products.description: The 'Audrey' trouser is crafted from fluid black tailoring wool and features an exaggerated silk godet panel at the side seam. Volume is introduced to the trousers movement as the silk side panels kick out as the wearer walks, while the pixelated floral motif adds a textural contrast to the structured base and gives a subtle nod to the British society florist and educator Constance Spry.

products.title: Evelyn Blouson
products.description: The 'Evelyn' Blouson is crafted in a mid-weight, short haired leather featuring an animal print and exaggerated ribbed wool collar. The nipped waist and vented back of the blouson draws its inspiration from women's aviation jackets of the 1930's. The knitted wool collar can be zipped to form a funnel-style closure or worn open for a straight shoulder line. Finishing touches include soft Nappa leat

products.title: Cuthbert Shirt - Striped
products.description: The 'Cuthbert' shirt is cut in a lightweight cream, white and black woven cotton stripe with a slightly sheer base. The 'Cuthbert' shirt features our signature burgundy embroidered S.S.DALEY logo, which complements the contrast horizontal patch pocket, and has a relaxed, boxy fit.

products.title: Cuthbert Shirt - Seersucker
products.description: The 'Cuthbert' shirt is cut in a crisp mid-weight seersucker cotton, with deep blue pinstripes against an ecru base. The 'Cuthbert' shirt features our signature burgundy embroidered S.S.DALEY logo, which complements the contrast horizontal patch pocket, and has a relaxed, boxy fit.

products.title: Marin Rope-Fastened Jacket — Black
products.description: A short jacket shaped by the codes of British coastal dress. The Marin Jacket is cut from mid-weight felted wool, chosen for its structure and warmth, and finished with a soft, matte surface. Across the front, braided rope fastenings reference traditional nautical closures, reworked here as graphic, tactile details rather than pure utility. The rope ties nod quietly to the atmosphere of the Britis

products.title: Kate' Twill Argyle Pleated Skirt
products.description: The 'Kate' Skirt has a mid-weight smooth base with delicate sun-ray pleats elongating the dusky pink and burgundy argyle painterly print, adding to the movement of the skirt and providing a subtle nod to the British painter Ithell Colquhoun - one of the artistic inspirations behind the AW24 collection.

products.title: Georgina Trouser
products.description: The 'Georgina' Trouser is crafted from premium 100% cotton and feature a double pleated front. These wide leg pleated trousers offer subtle volume through the hip and taper into a slightly flared leg, creating a clean, elongating line.

products.title: Florence Embroidered Evening Jacket — Black
products.description: The Florence Evening Jacket is cut from 100% premium Italian wool, drawing on the ease and refinement of 1940s gentleman’s smoking jackets, reinterpreted through a women’s silhouette. Across the front, hand-embroidered cotton floral cross-stitch motifs punctuate the wool surface, placed with restraint rather than symmetry. The effect is subtle and intimate decorative. A single ecru button closes t

products.title: Albert Jacket
products.description: The 'Albert' Single-Breasted Jacket is a men’s black floral suit jacket inspired by 1940s gentleman’s smoking jackets. Expertly crafted in Italy from 100% premium wool. The Jacket features hand-embroidered cotton floral cross-stitch motifs across the front. It is finished with a single Ecru button and our signature ‘Made in Italy’ fish-etching cuff label.

products.title: Birdwatcher Long Sleeve Shirt
products.description: Cut in a smooth 100% silk, the 'Birdwatcher' shirt is adorned with vividly printed birds lifted from an ornithological study from the early 18th century, picked out in various shades of green, purple, blue and red. The 'Birdwatcher' shirt and its prints are a love letter to the natural world — and to the tradition of the printed silk shirt as a vehicle for something genuinely worth looking at.

products.title: Birdwatcher Long Sleeve Shirt - Womens
products.description: Cut in a smooth 100% silk, the 'Birdwatcher' shirt is adorned with vividly printed birds lifted from an ornithological study from the early 18th century. Picked out in various shades of green, purple, blue and red. The 'Birdwatcher' shirt and its print design was originally created as a gift for singer Stevie Nicks ahead of her 2024 London Hyde Park performance.

products.title: Birdwatcher Short Sleeve Shirt - Womens
products.description: Cut in a smooth 100% silk, the 'Birdwatcher' shirt is adorned with vividly printed birds lifted from an ornithological study from the early 18th century. Picked out in various shades of green, purple, blue and red. The 'Birdwatcher' shirt and its print design was originally created as a gift for singer Stevie Nicks ahead of her 2024 London Hyde Park performance.

products.title: Circle Sweater - Womens
products.description: The 'Circle' sweater is knitted in a rich dark-brown Merino wool sourced from Scotland. The embroidered circular front draws inspiration from Fragonard's oil painting The Swing (1767). The asymmetric neck opening is referential of a similar style found on rowing jerseys from the 1920s. This can be tightened or loosened with the knitted drawstring-style tie.

products.title: Cochrane Vest - White
products.description: The 'Cochrane' vest features an asymmetric tie fastening at the neckline, drawn from the construction of historic rowing jerseys. Made in specially woven ribbed jersey in Portugal. The 'Cochrane' vest style first appeared in our Spring 2022 collection. Fit note: This style is designed for a close, body-hugging fit. If you prefer a more relaxed feel, we recommend sizing up.

products.title: Lancashire Sheep Shirt
products.description: Crafted from soft, breathable cream linen, this short-sleeved shirt features a boxy fit and a classic camp collar. A contrasting border detail frames the design. At its core is a striking printed motif of mirroring British sheep, lifted from an early 18th-century book of naturalist sketches documenting the flora and fauna of the Lancashire and Yorkshire counties.

products.title: Theodore Waxed Blouson
products.description: Synonymous with the wayward British weather, the 'Theodore' blouson takes inspiration from the classic waxed jackets of the 1980s and is cut in a British milled cotton with water resistant waxed coating. The smooth Nappa leather accents on the collar and pockets and the soft cotton lining offer a sense of ease, while the brass studs and two-way zip fastenings provide ample utility. A British arche

products.title: George' Trouser
products.description: The 'George' trouser is cut in structured wool suiting and features a double pleated front with a slight flare to the trouser leg.

products.title: Aker Henley T-Shirt
products.description: The 'Aker' is a womenswear approach to the Henley jersey styles traditionally worn by mens rowing teams throughout the 1930s. This long sleeve t-shirt features an asymmetric 4-button placket and is knitted in a specially made wool jersey for stretch and breathability.

products.title: Tap T-shirt - Navy
products.description: "I may not be rich, but I'm one hell of a tap dancer" was inspired by a badge owned by the grandmother of Steven's partner. The 'Tap' t-shirt is cut in a deep navy mid-weight cotton jersey and features ecru ringer-style ribbing on the neckline and sleeves, alongside the flocked-style printed slogan. A delicate S.S.DALEY logo sits at the back of the neck.

products.title: Tap Jersey T-shirt - Ecru
products.description: "I may not be rich, but I'm one hell of a tap dancer" was inspired by a badge owned by the grandmother of Steven's partner. The 'Tap' t-shirt is cut in a cream mid-weight cotton jersey and features burgundy ringer-style ribbing on the neckline and sleeves, alongside the flocked-style printed slogan. A delicate S.S.DALEY logo sits at the back of the neck.

products.title: Hi Rollers T-Shirt - Black
products.description: The 'Hi Rollers' t-shirt is a tongue-in-cheek riff on a fictitious roller club in the county of Kent. The slogan is picked out in white micro-beading against a black mid-weight cotton jersey base and is flanked by two chain-stitched roller skates. A flocked S.S.DALEY logo sits at the back neck of the t-shirt .

products.title: Thea Waxed Blouson
products.description: The 'Thea' blouson takes inspiration from the classic waxed jackets of the 1980s and is cut in a British milled cotton with water resistant waxed coating. The smooth Nappa leather accents on the collar and pockets and the soft cotton lining offer a sense of ease, while the brass studs and two-way zip fastenings provide ample utility. A British archetype modernised and finished with the S.S.DALEY s

products.title: Eliza Peplum Trench
products.description: The 'Eliza' peplum trench draws inspiration from a classic women's trench coat. The cropped and sculptured body of the trench is cut in a mid-weight cotton gaberdine and features various technical aspects, like the double-breasted front closure and soft leather under collar with added adjustable buckled neck closure. The cinched waist flares into a pleated peplum silhouette.

products.title: Clarence Chore Jacket - Green
products.description: Cut from a technical Japanese cotton-blend with a dry, structured hand, the Clarence Chore Jacket draws on the overshirts worn by London dockworkers in the mid-20th century, translated here through a more refined proportion. Three double-entry external pockets are lined in check cotton, with an internal chest pocket set into the interior. Ecru herringbone tape finishes the cuffs and traces the fro

products.title: Clarence Chore Jacket - Mustard
products.description: Cut from a technical Japanese cotton-blend with a dry, structured hand, the Clarence Chore Jacket draws on the overshirts worn by London dockworkers in the mid-20th century, translated here through a more refined proportion. Three double-entry external pockets are lined in check cotton, with an internal chest pocket set into the interior. Ecru herringbone tape finishes the cuffs and traces the fro

products.title: Ida Crochet Short
products.description: The 'Ida' crochet shorts are S.S.Daley's take on a women's bermuda-style short. The base of the shorts are cut in a soft mid-weight navy suiting wool and paired with an ecru custom cotton crochet layered over the top. A mid-high rise waist allows for comfortability and movement. The design of the crochet was inspired by the tearoom tablecloths of the 1920s and 30s, a nod to the popular J. Lyons &a

products.title: Clarence Trouser - Mustard
products.description: Drawing on a mid-century style, the 'Clarence' trouser is cut in a technical Japanese cotton-blend in a balmy mustard yellow hue. The double pleated front adds volume to the top of the trouser as it blends into a rounded leg silhouette. The internal button waist closure adds a heritage charm and the mid-high rise allows for extra comfort.

products.title: Clarence Trouser - Green
products.description: Drawing on a mid-century style, the 'Clarence' trouser is cut in a technical Japanese cotton-blend in an olive green hue. The double pleated front adds volume to the top of the trouser as it blends into a rounded leg silhouette. The internal button waist closure adds a heritage charm and the mid-high rise allows for extra comfort.

products.title: Spry Trouser
products.description: The 'Spry' trouser takes its name from the British educator and society florist Constance Spry, one of the inspirations for the SS25 runway collection. Cut in a mid-weight cotton twill, the 'Spry' trouser features an abstracted brushwork-style floral print, reminiscent of an antique needlework. The trouser has a relaxed, straight leg fit and a mid-rise waist.

products.title: Benjamin Short Sleeve Shirt
products.description: The 'Benjamin' shirt is cut in a lightweight breathable linen and features a printed motif inspired by Chromoxylographs - a 19th century woodblock printing process - of fish found in the British Isles.

products.title: Clarence Chore Jacket - Navy
products.description: Cut from a technical Japanese cotton-blend with a dry, structured hand, the Clarence Chore Jacket draws on the overshirts worn by London dockworkers in the mid-20th century, translated here through a more refined proportion. Three double-entry external pockets are lined in check cotton, with an internal chest pocket set into the interior. Ecru herringbone tape finishes the cuffs and traces the fro

products.title: Circle Sweater
products.description: The 'Circle' sweater is knitted in a rich dark-brown Merino wool sourced from Scotland. The embroidered circular front draws inspiration from Fragonard's oil painting The Swing (1767). The asymmetric neck opening is referential of a similar style found on rowing jerseys from the 1920s. This can be tightened or loosened with the knitted drawstring-style tie.

products.title: Blandine Vest - Black
products.description: Crafted in richly textured 100% Lambswool with a heather-style stitch, the 'Blandine' cable knit vest features a chunky ribbed crewneck and bold central cable. Designed for versatility, the 'Blandine' vest is knitted with low-cut armholes and unique side-tie fastenings. Wear it solo or layered effortlessly over shirts and dresses.

products.title: Hi Rollers T-Shirt - Ecru
products.description: The 'Hi Rollers' t-shirt is a tongue-in-cheek riff on a fictitious roller club in the county of Kent. The slogan is picked out in black micro-beading against an ecru mid-weight cotton jersey base and is flanked by two chain-stitched roller skates. A flocked S.S.DALEY logo sits at the back neck of the t-shirt .

products.title: Eva Circle Shirt
products.description: The 'Eva' Shirt is cut in a crisp cotton poplin and features a taut gathered centre front. The exaggerated cuffs and button-and-loop closure offers an alternative take on the simple button down white shirt . The sizing runs small. We recommend taking 1 or two sizes up.

products.title: Taali Skirt - Checked
products.description: The 'Taali' Skirt features a base cut in a sturdy mid-weight Italian cotton checkered fabric with hues of brown, white, red and black. Eight sections of alternating brushed beige cotton poplin and soft blac-and-red checkered cotton twill are distributed around the entirety of the skirt , creating motion as the panels swirl with the skirts movement. The skirt is designed to sit at the wearers waist

products.title: Turing Shirt - Striped
products.description: The 'Turing' shirt is cut in a lightweight cream, white and black woven cotton stripe with a slightly sheer base. The 'Turing' shirt features our signature burgundy embroidered S.S.DALEY logo, which complements the contrast horizontal patch pocket, and has a relaxed, boxy fit.

products.title: Estate Sale Shirt
products.description: The 'Estate Sale' shirt is cut in a soft yellow-and-white striped cotton and printed with a composition of different 18th - 19th century lithographs purchased from an estate sale in Wiltshire. A sketch of Clapham Church in Bedfordshire is nestled alongside a study of a Corinthian column, while the proposed design for a London residence sits on the back of the shirt .

products.title: Benjamin Long Sleeve Shirt
products.description: The 'Benjamin' long sleeve shirt is cut in a smooth cotton and features a printed motif inspired by Chromoxylographs - a 19th century woodblock printing process - of fish found in the British Isles. The shirt features authentic 1950s workwear details, like a chest pocket with a separate cigarette holder.

products.title: Birdwatcher Short Sleeve Shirt
products.description: Cut in a smooth 100% silk, the 'Birdwatcher' shirt is adorned with vividly printed birds lifted from an ornithological study from the early 18th century. They are picked out in various shades of green, purple, blue and red. The 'Birdwatcher' shirt and its print design was originally created as a gift for singer Stevie Nicks ahead of her 2024 London Hyde Park performance.

products.title: Picnic Shirt
products.description: The 'Picnic' shirt is cut in a smooth mid-weight linen. A bold, deep red border outlines the body of the shirt and its collar - complementing the vibrant fruit motif that adorns the entirety of the shirt, which was directly inspired by a 1950s tea towel from Jacksons (Berkshire).

products.title: Clement Short - Striped
products.description: The 'Clement' Short is crafted from lightweight cotton seersucker with delicately woven navy blue pinstripes. The cut of the 'Clement' short is inspired by the style of shorts worn by schoolboys in 1905s England.

products.title: Orla Trouser
products.description: The 'Orla' Trouser pays homage to a pair of favourite slacks worn by the British painter Gluck in the mid-1950s. Gluck (1895 - 1978) and their artistic practices were the impetus behind the SS25 womenswear collection. The trousers are cut in a soft sand-washed silk with a mid-high rise and a modesty thigh-length silk lining. A sheer organza cuff hem completes the trouser.

products.title: Lila Jersey Dress
products.description: The 'Lila' jersey dress is a continuation of the popular 'Cochrane' vest style, reworked to form a column dress silhouette. Specially knitted in a mid-weight ribbed jersey, the dress features an asymmetric tie front opening - reminiscent of knitted rowing jerseys from the late 1930s.

products.title: Orla Shirt
products.description: The 'Orla' Shirt is cut in a soft sand-washed silk and features a sheer Organza hem. The relaxed, oversized fit of the shirt is reminiscent of the painting smocks favoured by the English painter Gluck. Gluck (1895 - 1978) and their artistic practices were the impetus behind the SS25 womenswear collection.

products.title: Clem Shirt
products.description: The 'Clem' Shirt is cut in a soft Cotton Voile . The all-over repeat print of blue delphiniums was inspired by sketches of the flower found in a 1970s British Botany guide. The shirt features voluminous rounded sleeves and a relaxed, oversized silhouette.

products.title: Cochrane Vest Womens - Black
products.description: A modern reinterpretation of an S.S.DALEY classic, the SS25 'Cochrane' vest offers a subtle twist on the timeless racer back vest . Crafted in Portugal from soft 100% wool jersey and featuring an asymmetric tie fastening found on the knitted jerseys worn by rowers in the late 1930s, the 'Cochrane' vest gives a simple twist on a classic style. The 'Cochrane' vest first appeared in our debut Spring

products.title: Ada Short Sleeved Shirt
products.description: The 'Ada' Shirt is cut in a specially woven lightweight, semi-sheer cotton-silk blend fabric. The craftsmanship of the embroidery on the shirt can be seen in the intricately detailed motifs featuring peacocks, swallows, florals and sprigs and the crocheted trims that form the horizontal panels on the shirt.

products.title: Chelsea Slip Dress
products.description: The 'Chelsea' column maxi dress is cut on the bias in a lightweight sheer silk chiffon. The printed floral motif features hues of burgundy, teal and black and is directly inspired by a photograph from 1978 of English singer Kate Bush. The dress features a floor length figure-hugging silhouette and a flattering scooped neckline with delicate spaghetti straps.

products.title: Willow Slip Dress
products.description: The 'Willow' column maxi dress is cut in a lightweight fluid silk. The brushwork-style floral print is reminiscent of an antique needlework and pays homage to Constance Spry, the British educator and society florist. The dress features a floor length figure-hugging silhouette and a flattering scooped neckline with delicate spaghetti straps.

products.title: Mia Skirt
products.description: This sheer sunray pleated midi skirt features a squared handkerchief hemline in a contrasting black silk. Designed with layering in mind, the 'Mia' skirt makes for both a versatile styling piece and a standalone garment.

products.title: Pointer Skirt
products.description: The 'Pointer' skirt is cut in a cream silk twill and printed with a watercolour-style English Pointer dog against rows of vermillion borders. The printed motif is reminiscent of the 1970s silk twill scarf styles that would have been seen along the King's Road in Chelsea.

products.title: Kate Red Floral Pleated Skirt
products.description: The 'Kate' Skirt has a mid-weight smooth base and features finely crafted sunray pleats. The repeat printed floral motif and vivid red base are directly inspired by a photograph from 1978 of English singer Kate Bush. Designed to sit comfortably at the waist and skim the floor, the 'Kate' skirt was introduced as part of the SS25 collection.

products.title: Taali Skirt
products.description: The 'Taali' Skirt features a base cut in a smooth mid-weight blue-and-white striped cotton. Eight voluminous sections of alternating striped cotton panels are distributed around the entirety of the skirt , creating motion as the panels swirl with the skirts movement. The skirt is designed to fit at the wearers waist with two slim cut front pockets sitting just below the skirts waistband. The top o

products.title: Cochrane Vest - Ecru
products.description: The 'Cochrane' vest features an asymmetric tie fastening at the neckline, drawn from the construction of historic rowing jerseys. Made in specially woven ribbed jersey in Portugal. The 'Cochrane' vest style first appeared in our Spring 2022 collection. Fit note: This style is designed for a close, body-hugging fit. If you prefer a more relaxed feel, we recommend sizing up.

products.title: Arte Jacquard Motif Shirt
products.description: The 'Arte' short sleeve shirt is cut in a lightweight cotton jacquard fabric. Based on our popular 'Turing' short sleeve style, the Arte shirt features a vivid pale green and gold motif woven into the fabric. Further features include a signature contrast stripe integrated patch pocket and burgundy embroidered logo on the chest.

products.title: Denton Long Sleeve Shirt
products.description: The 'Denton' shirt features bold stripes in red, cream, white and blue against a soft cotton base. The shirt incorporates contrast-stripe patches on the sleeves and front pocket and is cut in a relaxed, oversized fit.

products.title: 'Cyril' Lamb Motif Cardigan - Tawny
products.description: The 'Cyril' cardigan is crafted from 100% superfine Scottish lambswool. Inspired by a 1950s Easter card, the cardigan features mirrored leaping lambs through intricate intarsia knitting . Black wool accents add depth to the fence detailing across the body and sleeves. With a boxy unisex silhouette and 6-button closure.

products.title: Cyril' Lamb Motif Cardigan - Green
products.description: The 'Cyril' cardigan is crafted from 100% superfine Scottish lambswool. Inspired by a 1950s Easter card, the cardigan features mirrored leaping lambs through intricate intarsia knitting. The result is a tactile and joyful piece of knitwear that feels as good as it looks.

products.title: Almer' Woven Stripe Shirt
products.description: The 'Almer' short sleeve shirt is cut in a midweight waffled cotton fabric. Based on our popular Turing short sleeve style, the 'Almer' shirt features alternating woven stripes of yellow, purple, orange and green with a contrast stripe integrated patch pocket and burgundy embroidered logo on the chest.

products.title: Elliot Silk Shirt
products.description: The Elliot shirt is cut in a cream lightweight silk and adorned with a printed procession of fish in a mixture of electric and muted blue tones, as if swimming around the wearers chest and back. The inspiration for the fish print is a homage to the fisherman figure in E.M. Forster's novella 'The Story of a Panic' - the inspiration for S.S.DALEY's AW24 collection.

products.title: Oxford Pillowcase shirt- White Stripe
products.description: The Oxford Pillowcase Shirt is cut from soft white-striped cotton and finished with a ruffled button placket and hem. An embroidered S.S.DALEY logo in deep burgundy adds a vivid contrast against the white cotton.

products.title: Oxford Pillowcase Shirt - Blue and White
products.description: The Oxford Pillowcase Shirt is cut from soft blue and white striped cotton and finished with a ruffled button placket and hem. An embroidered S.S.DALEY logo in deep burgundy adds a vivid contrast against the striped cotton.

products.title: Oxford' Pillowcase shirt - Blue
products.description: The Oxford Pillowcase Shirt is cut from soft blue cotton and finished with a ruffled button placket and hem. An embroidered S.S.DALEY logo in deep burgundy adds a vivid contrast against the blue cotton.

products.title: Jasper' Duck Cardigan - Mustard
products.description: The 'Jasper' Duck Cardigan is a signature piece of the brands inspired by a 1940s Oxford rowing team cardigan. This unique knit pays tribute to the historic "Mallard Song", sung by Oxford teams to boost spirit during rowing victories, and is beautifully reimagined with mirrored ducks crafted in mustard yellow and ecru tones. Knitted from 100% superfine Scottish lambswool, the 'Jasper' Cardigan fea

products.title: 'Jasper' Duck Cardigan - Pink
products.description: The 'Jasper' Duck Cardigan is a signature S.S.DALEY piece inspired by a 1940s Oxford rowing team cardigan. This unique knit pays tribute to the classic rowing cardigan, reimagined with S.S.DALEY's signature duck motif, worked in intarsia. Available in mens and womens sizing.

products.title: Cian Buttoned Top - Black
products.description: A buttoned stretch jersey vest made from a soft, elasticated jersey. The vest follows the torso closely, fastening through the front with tonal buttons. The silhouette is deliberately compact, sitting tight across the chest and waist for a sculpted fit. Fit note: This style is designed for a very close, body-hugging fit. If you prefer a more relaxed feel, we recommend sizing up.

products.title: Cian Buttoned Top - White
products.description: A buttoned stretch jersey vest made from a soft, elasticated jersey. The vest follows the torso closely, fastening through the front with tonal buttons. The silhouette is deliberately compact, sitting tight across the chest and waist for a sculpted fit. Fit note: This style is designed for a very close, body-hugging fit. If you prefer a more relaxed feel, we recommend sizing up.

products.title: Abel Crochet Shirt - Green
products.description: The 'Abel' crochet shirt features a motif inspired by hand painted ceramic tiles found adorning the streets of Guimarães, Portugal. The Ecru and pistachio green cotton yarn is worked by hand to create the tile motif, meaning each piece has unique character and none are quite identical.

products.title: Abel Crochet Shirt - Blue
products.description: The 'Abel' crochet shirt features a motif inspired by hand painted ceramic tiles found adorning the streets of Guimarães, Portugal. The Ecru and vivid blue cotton yarn is worked by hand to create the tile motif, meaning each piece has unique character and none are quite identical.

products.title: Harold' V-Neck Sweater - Brown/Ecru
products.description: The 'Harold' V-Neck sweater is evocative of a classic 1950s British railway uniform style and imbued with S.S.DALEY's signature wit and playfulness. Inspired by Steven's dogs Basil and Ernest, we see a partnership of Dachshund dogs on the front. Their bodies spiritedly intertwined, they appear to be in dance. The Harold V-Neck Sweater is knitted in Scotland in 100% pure new wool.

products.title: Milton' Cargo - Chocolate brown
products.description: The cut of the 'Milton' Cargo is inspired by a 1950's pair of British workwear trousers , here seen in a rich chocolate brown brushed cotton. The applied rectangular pocket on the thigh of the trouser references a 1930's British Lieutenant coat, here finished with an ecru criss-cross embroidered overlock. The back right of the trouser also features the house Lino printed twill label.
